description: Pinwheel provides APIs and SDKs for payroll-linked direct deposit switching, bill switching, recurring bill management, and income/employment verification. It connects financial institutions and fintechs to payroll and billing data sources for onboarding, account funding, verification, and account management use cases.
summary: Pinwheel exposes public developer documentation for a versioned REST API at `api.getpinwheel.com`, including Admin API endpoints for API key management; authentication uses a Pinwheel-issued API secret plus a required `Pinwheel-Version` header. No public GraphQL API, MCP server, or CLI was found.
